name: logistics fleet supervisors managing 10-20 vehicles tool
description: For logistics fleet supervisors managing 10-20 vehicles, missed inspections cause compliance penalties. We automate scheduling and tracking instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets and calendars.
problem_solved: Difficulty in tracking and scheduling timely vehicle safety inspections.
features: simple dashboard for tracking inspection status
